## Mechanics
- 

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] There is no room feature that is uniquely superior to the other option.
- [ ] There is not enough room to fit all room features.
- [ ] The room features have enough varied sizes to where the player has to be conscious of it.
- [ ] There are at least 3 actions spread out amongst the room and its features.
